final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing e-commerce announcement poster for UGREEN NAS brand 618 anniversary celebration.

Style/medium: e-commerce announcement poster, commercial brand poster
Composition: centered hero layout with brand messaging hierarchy, clear CTA zone
Subject: UGREEN NAS (绿联私有云) 618 anniversary celebration promotion
Scene/backdrop: clean commercial backdrop suitable for e-commerce platform display
Lighting/mood: bright, aspirational, celebratory
Color palette: brand-aligned with 618 shopping festival energy
Materials/textures: polished digital finish for web display
Text (verbatim): 绿联私有云 618周年庆
Constraints: must read clearly as thumbnail and full view, brand-safe for e-commerce platforms
Avoid: generic stock imagery, cluttered layout, conflicting promotional messaging
